title: gh-135698: Fix Cross-interpreter Queue.full() With Negative/Default max_size
author: ericsnowcurrently
body:
We weren't handling non-positive `maxsize` values (including the default) properly in `Queue.full()`.  This change fixes that and adjusts an associated assert.

<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-135698 -->
* Issue: gh-135698
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->
